data.short_description: Essentia Hotels & Resorts announced the opening of its 81-key Nagpur property, marking its entry into Central India's market. The hotel features 81 rooms including a presidential suite, over 41,000 sq ft of banqueting/event space, and a Convention Centre for MICE and weddings.

data.location: Eden Centre, High Wycombe, UK (postcode matches Eden Centre)
data.short_description: Wingstop is hiring a General Manager and Assistant Manager in High Wycombe via Indeed, suggesting a new branch is planned at the Eden Centre. The company has not yet appeared on the Eden Centre or Wingstop websites.

data.location: Former Driving Test Centre, Cayton Low Road, Eastfield, near Scarborough, North Yorkshire, UK
data.short_description: Aldi is progressing plans for a new food store in Eastfield after North Yorkshire Council's initial rejection of a demolition prior notification was resolved. The application was submitted in June 2025 with over 94% community support from 255 responses.

SCHEELS announced the closure of its Home and Hardware Store in Fargo with no specific timeline provided. The store has served the community for more than 120 years; the company said it will work to retain employees across its other locations.
Rogue Rock Gym in Medford has reopened after being closed since February, with several community members attending opening day. No further details were provided in the article text.

data.status: grand opening on May 4 at 11 a.m.
data.short_description: Saucy! by KFC opened its first Manatee County location at 5484 Lena Road in Bradenton, near State Road 70 and Interstate 75. The restaurant features chicken tenders, 13 sauces, sandwiches, desserts, beverages, and two exclusive new menu items for this location.

data.location: Southern bank of the Rio Grande, just outside South Fork, CO
data.status: Grand Opening event during Fourth of July week
data.short_description: Rio Grande RV Resort is a new resort development near South Fork featuring log cabins, clubhouses, and fountains. A Grand Opening event is scheduled during Fourth of July week this summer.

Whitbread, owner of Premier Inn, announced plans to shed ~3,800 UK/Ireland roles and phase out remaining Beefeater and Brewers Fayre restaurants. The Oxfordshire locations are under consultation with no confirmed closure confirmation yet.

data.short_description: Whitbread announced plans to phase out Beefeater and Brewers Fayre restaurants as part of a restructuring shedding ~3,800 UK/Ireland jobs. Whether this specific Oxfordshire location is included remains unconfirmed as the proposal is still under consultation.

data.location: Grossmont Center and West Valley Mall in California; Northlake Mall in Georgia; Grandville, Michigan; Saint Cloud, Minnesota; The Mall at Fox Run in New Hampshire; Boulevard Mall in New York; Pittsburgh Mills in Pennsylvania (and others)
data.status: permanently closing; completed their liquidation sales and ceased operations; shuttered
data.short_description: Macy’s is permanently closing 14 department store locations across the United States in May 2026 as part of "Bold New Chapter" restructuring prioritizing digital over physical retail. Major sites include those in CA, GA, MI, MN, NH, NY, PA. Staff offered severance or transfers.
Hershey Inn & Suites now open in Dauphin County.
Doylestown jewelry store closing as owner retires after 20 years.

The Nazca Lines Restaurant, a Peruvian restaurant built with intention with custom kitchen and heritage menu (lomo saltado, seco a la limeña, ají de gallina), will open in the old Happy Teriyaki space. Executive chef is former Off the Hook chef Santiago Gomero.
Michi Ramen & Hibachi and Tsaocha (bubble tea, fried chicken, egg waffles) has opened in the old Noodles & Co. space.

data.location: 150 Cranes Roost Blvd. in Altamonte Springs
data.short_description: Azal Coffee will offer Yemeni, Saudi and Turkish coffees, teas, fruit drinks, desserts and pastries at 150 Cranes Roost Blvd. in Altamonte Springs next month.
Don Patron Bar Bistro Lounge to open in the old Pretty in Pink Tea Room space this summer at 34 E. Main St. in Apopka with wagyu sliders, lobster quesadillas, chimichurri NY strip and live DJs.

data.location: old Hooters building near the Seminole Towne Center in Sanford
data.short_description: Hooked Fish Camp from F&D Restaurant Concepts has opened in the old Hooters building near the Seminole Towne Center in Sanford with Southern-leaning seafood dishes.

data.location: 2208 W Morrison Ave, Hyde Park, South Tampa
data.status: will serve its last meal on May 21
data.short_description: Haven in South Tampa will serve its last meal on May 21. Bern’s Steak House Group called it the end of "a successful and well-loved run."

data.status: won't open until fall 2027; Coming Soon
data.short_description: Bern's Steak House Group plans to replace with new seafood concept Peddler + Potter Oyster House featuring daily changing seafood menu, raw bar with Florida oysters, open kitchen.

data.status: “is done”; may have closed its doors for good
data.short_description: Butler Food Center “is done” per city official. Store in foreclosure after new owners (post-2023 sale) faced issues; one owner liquidated assets and fled. Sign notes varying hours.

data.status: will open a location ... this summer

data.status: slated for construction from July to November
data.short_description: Manyavar, an international Indian apparel brand, is bringing a 3,050-square-foot location to Leander based on a Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation filing. The brand offers Indian-inspired celebration wear and has over 600 stores globally.

data.location: 6290 W. Irlo Bronson Memorial Highway, Celebration, FL
data.event_date: On or after bankruptcy petition date (March 2026)
data.short_description: Neighborhood Restaurant Partners Florida (NRPF), an Atlanta-based Applebee's franchisee, filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy covering 53 locations in Georgia, Florida, and Alabama. Ten locations are seeking lease rejections as part of the filing, with this being one of nine Florida units closed on or after the bankruptcy petition date.

data.location: 3315 U.S. (address truncated in article text), Casselberry, FL
data.event_date: On or after bankruptcy petition date (March 2026)
data.short_description: NRPF filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy covering 53 locations in Georgia, Florida, and Alabama, with 10 locations seeking lease rejections. This is one of nine Florida units closed on or after the bankruptcy petition date; the full address was truncated in the provided text.

data.location: Alpharetta City Center, Alpharetta, GA (street address not specified)
data.status: will open in Alpharetta City Center this summer
data.short_description: Giulia Italian Bakery, founded in 2020 by brothers Ben and Seth Gjuka, is opening its fourth location in Alpharetta City Center this summer. The bakery offers fresh Italian pastries, breads, sandwiches, wine, beer, coffee, and gelato made with Italian-sourced ingredients.

data.location: 3333 S. Orange Avenue, Suite 105, Orlando (SoDo), FL
data.event_date: Opened March 19, 2026; Grand Opening event May 18, 2026
data.short_description: Sabai Thai Street Food, a family-owned Thai restaurant, soft-opened on March 19, 2026 and will host its official grand opening celebration on May 18, 2026 in honor of AANHPI Heritage Month. The restaurant is owned by Viradee Pissara, her son Alex Pissara, and Bill Spradlin, and features family recipes from Thailand including Tom Yum noodle soup, Isan-style sausage, and wok-fired noodles.

data.location: Adjacent to the Humble Administrator's Garden, Suzhou, China
data.short_description: Boundless Matro Boutique Village, operated by Suzhou Matro Group, officially opened in historic Suzhou, featuring 22 restored red-brick warehouses spanning 25,000 sq m with international pavilions from the UK, Italy, Japan, and Australia. The development also launched a Live Streaming Alliance with a dedicated International Live Streaming Space Station connecting global brands with Chinese consumers.

The article also notes that Russell & Bromley has departed its Westgate ground-floor store and Claire's has also closed at the Westgate.

data.store_name: St. Regis Costa Mujeres Resort Cancun
data.location: Costa Mujeres, approximately 20 minutes north of Cancun, Mexico
data.status: now accepting reservations for stays as of June 25, 2026
data.short_description: The St. Regis Costa Mujeres Resort Cancun is now accepting reservations with stays beginning June 25, 2026, offering 160 guest rooms/suites, 80 branded residences, multiple pools, a full-service spa, and several restaurant concepts. The resort was originally announced in late 2022 with a planned early 2025 opening but was delayed to mid-2026.

data.short_description: MA/NA, a new luxury Japanese dining and drinking destination, has officially opened in the heart of Mayfair. It offers refined Japanese dining transitioning to a late-night cocktail bar with signature dishes including O-Toro Tartare and A5 Wagyu Ishiyaki. The venue is from Thesleff Group and is certified to serve Kobe beef.
